full_text:
An update for evolution is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Evolution is a GNOME application that provides integrated email, calendar, contact management, and communications functionality.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): WebKitGTK 2.49.4: JavaScript evaluation result serialization changes [rhel-9.6.z] (JIRA:RHEL-111959)
